overview: A premium multi-functional clock app with a visionOS-inspired Liquid Glass aesthetic. Features four modules — World Clock, Alarm, Stopwatch, and Timer — wrapped in deep glassmorphism with specular rim lighting, vibrancy text hierarchy, and fluid animations. Persistent backend storage keeps your alarms, pinned time zones, and timer presets safe across sessions.
features: World Clock with searchable city list and pinnable time zones
Alarms with math-problem dismissal to prevent accidental snoozing
High-precision stopwatch with color-coded lap history
Multiple concurrent timers with Pomodoro and Tabata presets
Liquid Glass glassmorphism UI with specular rim lighting and vibrancy text hierarchy
Pill-shaped bottom navigation bar with animated SF-style icons
Fullscreen countdown mode for focused timer use
Persistent backend storage with localStorage fallback
